label: Meridian Sleeper Cell
description: Meridian Sleeper Cell is a compact stateroom set between the Latticewake’s vitreous ribs, its prismatic wall-panels tuned to admit only the Filament Gallery’s most stable bands of refracted glare. A recessed berth is built into the dark crystalline tilework, its rectilinear scoring continued up the bedframe to preserve the ship’s bearing grid even at rest. Glass-collared lockers and a sealed writing niche are inset flush with the ribs, their seams tarred against the abrasive shear fronts that scour Kharion Prismworld’s laminar skies. Overhead, exposed filament conduits run in a shallow channel, their measured harmonics damped by quilted baffles to keep the chamber’s geometry quiet and exact.
